claim_title: Version declarations are inconsistent across locations

results.description: Extract version values from four locations and confirm inconsistency.
results.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
import re
from pathlib import Path

pyproject = Path("pyproject.toml").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
version_py = Path("cohort_projections/version.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
output_init = Path("cohort_projections/output/__init__.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
claude = Path("CLAUDE.md").read_text(encoding="utf-8")

pyv = re.search(r'^version\s*=\s*"([^"]+)"', pyproject, flags=re.MULTILINE).group(1)
vfile = re.search(r'__version__\s*=\s*"([^"]+)"', version_py).group(1)
ov = re.search(r'__version__\s*=\s*"([^"]+)"', output_init).group(1)
cv = re.search(r"\|\s+\*\*Version\*\*\s+\|\s+([0-9.]+)\s+\|", claude).group(1)
unique = len({pyv, vfile, ov, cv})

print(f"PYPROJECT_VERSION={pyv}")
print(f"VERSION_PY={vfile}")
print(f"OUTPUT_INIT_VERSION={ov}")
print(f"CLAUDE_VERSION={cv}")
print(f"UNIQUE_VERSION_VALUES={unique}")
if unique >= 3:
    print("ASSERTION=PASS")
else:
    print("ASSERTION=FAIL")
    raise SystemExit(1)
PY
failure_reasons: stdout does not match regex: UNIQUE_VERSION_VALUES=[3-9]
